'''nagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:oligoclonally|oligoclonally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oligoclonally|oligoclonally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nagate|nagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nagatesher|nagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nagatesherĂ«m|nagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nagatero|nagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nagateshĂ«|nagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nagateshĂ«m|nagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinagatero|gokinagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinagateshĂ«|gokinagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinagateshĂ«m|gokinagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonagankerom|gonagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonagankeshĂ«|gonagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonagankeshĂ«m|gonagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonagankeya|gonagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nagaterom|nagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nagatemu|nagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nagateya|nagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinagaterom|gokinagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinagatemu|gokinagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinagateya|gokinagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nagagate|nagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nagagatesher|nagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nagagatesherĂ«m|nagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nagagatero|nagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nagagateshĂ«|nagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nagagateshĂ«m|nagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinagagatero|gokinagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinagagateshĂ«|gokinagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinagagateshĂ«m|gokinagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonagagankerom|gonagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonagagankeshĂ«|gonagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonagagankeshĂ«m|gonagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonagagankeya|gonagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nagagaterom|nagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nagagatemu|nagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nagagateya|nagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinagagaterom|gokinagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinagagatemu|gokinagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinagagateya|gokinagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠte|nĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠtesher|nĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠtero|nĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠgĂŠtero|gokinĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠterom|nĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠtemu|nĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠgĂŠteya|nĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠgĂŠterom|gokinĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠgĂŠteya|gokinĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafgafte|nafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafgaftesher|nafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafgaftesherĂ«m|nafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafgaftero|nafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafgafteshĂ«|nafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafgafteshĂ«m|nafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafgaftero|gokinafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafgafteshĂ«|gokinafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafgafteshĂ«m|gokinafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafgafnkerom|gonafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafgafnkeshĂ«|gonafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafgafnkeshĂ«m|gonafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafgafnkeya|gonafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafgafterom|nafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafgaftemu|nafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafgafteya|nafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafgafterom|gokinafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafgaftemu|gokinafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafgafteya|gokinafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
